data.description: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan meets Hamas delegation headed by Hamas Shura Council Head Muhammad Darwish in Istanbul

data.title: OSR Holdings (NASDAQ: OSRH) will host a Virtual Investor Event on August 6, 2025 in Bellevue, Washington with key updates.
data.description: OSR Holdings, Inc., a prominent healthcare company listed on the NASDAQ exchange under the ticker symbol OSRH, will be hosting a Virtual Investor Event on Wednesday, August 6, 2025 at 8:00 a.m. The event aims to showcase the company's advancements in biomedical innovations aimed at enhancing global health and wellness. This announcement was made by the company based in Bellevue, Wash.

data.title: MiRus gets NTAP from CMS for EUROPA™ Posterior Cervical Fusion System utilizing rhenium alloys.
data.description: In Atlanta on August 1, 2025, MiRus secured New Technology Add-on Payment (NTAP) approval from the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) for their EUROPA® Posterior Cervical System. This system, utilizing proprietary rhenium alloys, is designed for treating conditions in the cervical and upper thoracic regions. This recognition by CMS is significant as it reflects the innovative approach of MiRus in developing advanced medical technologies.

data.title: NexusTek launches Data Modernization services for AI, aiming to create a single source of truth.
data.description: On August 1, 2025, NexusTek, a prominent company specializing in AI, infrastructure, and security services, introduced their new Data Modernization services aimed at establishing a centralized source of information crucial for the effective implementation of AI and advanced analytics strategies. This initiative is expected to significantly enhance the accuracy and efficiency of data utilization for organizations looking to leverage cutting-edge technologies.

data.title: James D. Thomas, MD, elected President of ABEM. ABEM-certified physician at St. Anne's Hospital, Fall River, Mass.
data.description: In East Lansing, Michigan, on August 1, 2025, James D. Thomas, MD, was announced as the President of the American Board of Emergency Medicine (ABEM). Dr. Thomas, a certified ABEM physician, currently works in Emergency Medicine at St. Anne's Hospital in Fall River, Massachusetts.

data.title: BillionToOne adds new executives to support growth of UNITY and Northstar platforms in molecular diagnostics.
data.description: BillionToOne, Inc., based in Menlo Park, California, disclosed on August 1, 2025, the appointment of new leaders to their team. The molecular diagnostics company aims to develop precise tests that are available to everyone. The recent additions bring significant experience in enhancing operational efficiency to the company.

data.title: XRP's potential 20% price surge in August is fueled by a 'bullish divergence', with key support at $2.80-$2.95 seen as crucial.
data.description: Analysts are closely monitoring XRP's support zone ranging between $2.80 and $2.95, which is becoming a significant battleground. This price range is considered a crucial "make-or-break" level for the cryptocurrency in the coming month.

data.title: Bitcoin miner Riot Platforms (RIOT) announces record Q2 2025 earnings due to high Bitcoin prices and expanded mining.
data.description: Riot Platforms, a prominent company in the Bitcoin mining industry, has announced remarkable financial achievements for the second quarter of 2025. The company experienced an exceptional performance during this period, primarily due to the surge in Bitcoin prices and the expansion of its mining activities. This success has enabled Riot Platforms to achieve record-breaking financial results, showcasing its strong position in the market.

data.title: Attend Florida Realtors® 2025 Convention & Trade Expo in Orlando on Aug. 1, 2025. Gain insights from top leaders, network, and see latest high-tech devices.
data.description: The Florida Realtors® 2025 Convention & Trade Expo in Orlando, Florida on August 1, 2025, provides access to success strategies from leading real estate figures, networking opportunities with industry peers, and showcases the newest high-tech gadgets. The event promises attendees avenues to enhance their skills and connections within the real estate sector.

data.title: Bitcoin dips below $115,000, traders remain optimistic. Bitcoin dominance at 62%. Market sentiment hints at reversal.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has dropped below $115,000, leading traders to scout for potential buying chances. The decrease in Bitcoin's value was predicted by crypto trader Astronomer, who highlighted the rise in Bitcoin Dominance (BTC.D) to 62% and the possibility of further increase. The trader sees this correction as beneficial, as overall market sentiment seems to be shifting towards capitulation and despair, signaling a potential market turnaround. Astronomer intends to re-engage in the market after more substantial declines and additional BTC.D movements.

data.title: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. releases Interim report on Share Buy-Back Programme transactions.
data.description: Banco Comercial Português, S.A. has released an update on their Share Buy-Back Programme's transactions. The report discloses the details of the interim transactions carried out by the bank. Key figures mentioned include the number of shares repurchased and the total value spent on the buy-back. This information provides transparency regarding the bank's activities in the stock market and offers insights into their investment strategies.

data.title: Zions Bancorporation increases quarterly dividends to $0.45/share, up 5% from prior quarter. Board declared dividends on common stock.
data.description: Zions Bancorporation, N.A. (NASDAQ: ZION), based in Salt Lake City, declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.45 per common share, marking a $0.02 per share increase, representing a growth of around 5% compared to the last quarter. The announcement was made by the company's board of directors on August 1, 2025.

data.title: Crescent Energy's earnings report set for 2025-08-04, estimated EPS $0.28, stock at $9.24, 52-week down 12.51%, analysts bullish with $15.0 target.
data.description: Crescent Energy (NYSE: CRGY) is due to report its quarterly earnings on August 4, 2025, with analysts expecting earnings per share (EPS) of $0.28. The company previously exceeded EPS estimates by $0.12 in the last quarter, resulting in a 3.4% drop in share price. Crescent Energy's shares were trading at $9.24 as of July 31, down 12.51% over the last 52 weeks, causing concern for long-term shareholders. Analysts have an Outperform rating for Crescent Energy, with an average price target of $15.00, suggesting a potential 62.34% upside. The market eagerly awaits the upcoming earnings report for insights into the company's performance and future guidance.

data.title: Boise Cascade (NYSE: BCC) to report Q2 earnings with EPS estimate $1.72. Past performance saw stock price drop post EPS miss. Shares trading at $83.81, down 33.4% in 52-week span. Three analysts rate Boise Cascade as a Buy.
data.description: Boise Cascade, listed as BCC on NYSE, is soon set to release its quarterly earnings report on August 4, 2025. Analysts predict an EPS of $1.72, with hopes that the company will surpass this estimate and provide positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. In the previous quarter, the company missed EPS by $0.22, leading to a 5.4% drop in share price the following day. Shares of Boise Cascade were trading at $83.81 as of July 31, marking a 33.4% decrease over the last 52 weeks. The consensus rating from 3 analysts is Buy. Investors are advised to focus not just on earnings beats or misses, but on the guidance and forecasts provided by the company during the announcement as they often affect stock prices significantly.
